since_last: 68% of 85 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.14%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.26% · BTC -0.55% · Gold +0.71% · Nasdaq100 +0.78%. 68% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.14%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.14%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +9.55%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +9.55%, LRCX +6.71%, ARM +6.29%, ASML +6.19%, TER +5.78%. Laggards: SNAP -4.36%, AI -2.56%, META -2.38%, PINS -1.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.51% at $199.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
